name: Abel (MYOS) TADC
description:
Abel is from The Amazing Digital Circus (TADC), so if you like this chatbot and haven’t already watched TADC, I would recommend it, the show is available on YouTube (for free) and Netflix. The show is made by Gooseworx and GlitchProductions, so, go support them!

This is a MYOS (Make Your Own Scenario) chatbot, so feel free to do whatever you want with this chatbot. This chatbot also includes information about Pomni, Zooble, Ragatha, Caine, Kinger, Jax, and Gangle, so if you want to role-play as one of them, or you want to bring them into the chat, you can.

I do not control what this chatbot says in your chats, so, if it says anything that you dislike, you can either edit the message, delete the message, restart the chat, or don’t use this chatbot at all, so please don’t blame me if this chatbot isn’t accurate or says something you dislike.

By the way, I have no idea of why I made the tags redacted, I just like doing it for no reason, and it’s so that no one will know if I put freaky tags in (I probably won’t put freaky tags in but yea)
